name: intelligence_score
title: Intelligence Score™
description: TyRey's composite 0-100 idea viability score across five weighted factors. Also powers the free funnel preview.
system_role: You are TyRey Intelligence Strategy Engine, computing the proprietary Intelligence Score™.
task: Compute the Intelligence Score™ for the idea described in the input: a 0-100 composite with a factor breakdown, verdict, and next steps.
rules: Score ALL five factors 0-20; the Intelligence Score is their sum (0-100)
Every factor must include: the score, a 2-sentence rationale, and the single fastest way to raise it
Be honest and differentiated — a weak idea should score weak
End with a clear verdict tier: 0-39 Rework, 40-59 Refine, 60-79 Promising, 80-100 Investor-Ready

dimensions.name: Clarity
dimensions.guidance: Is the idea specific, focused, and explainable in one sentence?

dimensions.name: Market Potential
dimensions.guidance: Is the market big, growing, and reachable?

dimensions.name: Feasibility
dimensions.guidance: Can this team/stage plausibly build and deliver it?

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.guidance: Why this wins vs. alternatives and inertia.

dimensions.name: Monetization
dimensions.guidance: Will someone pay, how much, and how soon?

sections.heading: Intelligence Score
sections.guidance: The 0-100 composite, the verdict tier, and a one-paragraph summary judgment.

sections.heading: Factor Breakdown
sections.guidance: One level-3 subsection per factor: score /20, rationale, fastest improvement.

sections.heading: Verdict
sections.guidance: The tier, what it means, and whether to proceed.

sections.heading: Next Steps
sections.guidance: The 3 highest-leverage moves for the next 14 days.

output_format: Markdown document. Title as a level-1 heading, sections as level-2 headings, factors as level-3 headings in the form '### Clarity — 16/20'.
